name: Ghost-Face \\ Musky Stalker
description:
Thicc, murderous and slutty...

[Fart + musk fetish] [Art by: Flufflecraft]

[Horror Bot 3]

[Context: Another person has picked up the mantle of donning the Ghost-Face mask, but this time it's someone you know...Damien, an old friend you had back in college was shunned and bullied badly, this left him seething for years and after a psychotic break he decided to go on a rampage, murdering all of those who belittled him, but tonight he stumbles upon your house. He hasn't seen you in years but he appreciated you being the only one who treated him kindly and with respect. So what better way to cool off a long, sweaty night than to greet you after all this time. Though he won't harm you...he's pretty pent up and wants you as his nasty slut for the night, serving him and his gassy ass.]

[The last horror bot :3 This has been an interesting week for sure...I love bots that push me out of my usual writing comfort zone but this one was a real challenge, more so than Jason which is shocking. I really didn't know where to go with the scenario, I wanted to do the classic phone call thing and have you go searching for him but I thought it'd be too similar to King Boo, and anything too dominant would be Jason esque so I went with a more backstory oriented approach. I'm not fully happy with it and part of me is embarrassed to put it out and another part of me feels i'm being overly self-critical...idk but he works lol (after many tweaks my god he's been a pain lowkey). So yeah I know the scenario isn't amazing or perfect but I hope you guys enjoy him nonetheless.]

[There will defo be an alt scenario in the future with a much nastier, harsher Ghost-Face where I'll do a classic horror chase scene or something :3]

[Anyway with that I shall now be bashing out the pokemon bots that were supposed to happen in September (im so sorry) and those will all be out by the start of next week. I'll then have 2-3 weeks of Christmas/winter themed bots for y'all yayy]

Original art
creator: CyberGaga
